description: Phishing templates impersonating retail brands and loyalty programs

templates.name: Loyalty Rewards Expiration
suggested_subject_lines: Your rewards points expire in 48 hours — claim now
Don't lose your rewards! Points expiring soon
Last chance: Redeem your loyalty points before they disappear
templates.notes: FOMO (fear of missing out) template. High click rate due to universal appeal of not wanting to lose value.

templates.name: Amazon – Order Problem
suggested_subject_lines: There was a problem processing your order
Action required: confirm your recent Amazon order
Your Amazon order is on hold
templates.notes: Order-problem lure works year-round. Beginner difficulty; good for a baseline assessment.

templates.name: Costco – Membership Renewal Failed
suggested_subject_lines: Action needed: update your membership payment
Your Costco membership is about to lapse
templates.notes: Membership-renewal billing lure. Familiar everyday scenario; strong for general-population campaigns.
